title: memory_mutation
description: Append-only audit trail entry for any change to a memory spec. Replaces direct writes to bizcity_memory_logs — that table is now a projection, not a source of truth (R-EVT-1).

memory_id.description: ID of the memory spec affected.

step_name.description: Pipeline step (e.g. planner, executor, reflector, rest_api, auto_create, finalize, user).

details.description: Free-form payload (was detail_json in the legacy row).
